trait_purchase_main.name: Trait
trait_purchase_main.description: Purchase a conditional bonus. Costs 30 points and grants a +Tier bonus to TWO chosen stats when user-selected conditions are met.

effects.description: +Tier bonus to TWO chosen stats when conditions are met.

attribute_combat_focus.name: Focus
attribute_combat_focus.description: Represents your character's precision, fighting skill, and mental fortitude.
mechanics: Improves `Accuracy` for all attacks.
Increases `Initiative`, helping you act sooner in combat.
Boosts `Resolve` score against mental and psychic effects.

attribute_combat_mobility.name: Mobility
attribute_combat_mobility.description: Governs physical agility, speed, and evasiveness. It determines how well you move and position yourself in combat.
mechanics: Increases your base `Movement` speed.
Boosts `Avoidance` score, making you harder to hit with attacks.
Improves `Initiative`, contributing to your reaction time.

attribute_combat_power.name: Power
attribute_combat_power.description: The raw force of your abilities, whether physical, psychic, or supernatural. It is the primary stat for inflicting harm and control.
mechanics: Directly increases your base `Damage` (multiplied by 1.5).
Boosts your `Conditions` check for applying status effects.
Increases `Stability` score against physical effects like shoves and grabs.

attribute_combat_endurance.name: Endurance
attribute_combat_endurance.description: Represents physical resilience, stamina, and the ability to withstand punishment and shrug off debilitating effects.
mechanics: Significantly boosts `Durability`, reducing all incoming damage.
Increases `Vitality` score against biological or draining effects.
Contributes to your maximum Health Pool through the Survival Check.

attribute_utility_awareness.name: Awareness
attribute_utility_awareness.description: Represents your perception, intuition, and ability to notice subtle details and react to hidden dangers. Awareness players will have an easier time picking up on things already set in the narrative, such as finding hidden information.
mechanics: Improves `Initiative`, representing your alertness at the start of combat.
The core stat for all `Perception`, `Tracking`, and `Sense Motive` skill checks.
Used to detect hidden enemies, find clues, and avoid ambushes.

attribute_utility_communication.name: Communication
attribute_utility_communication.description: The ability to effectively influence, deceive, inspire, or intimidate others through social interaction and force of personality. Communication players are able to better shape the narrative to their goals, such as persuading a truce between two warring factions.
mechanics: Governs all social skill checks like `Persuasion`, `Deception`, and `Intimidation`.
Can be used to de-escalate conflicts, gather information without force, or lead a team.
Determines the effectiveness of social-based conditions like `Taunt` or `Enthrall`.

attribute_utility_intelligence.name: Intelligence
attribute_utility_intelligence.description: Represents logic, reasoning, memory, and the ability to analyze information and solve complex problems. Intelligence players are able to unlock paths previously inaccessible, such as hacking into a database to add the party to the guest list.
mechanics: Governs all `Knowledge`, `Crafting`, `Research`, and `Strategy` checks.
Used to identify enemy weaknesses, create or disable technology, and decipher codes.
Crucial for using complex `Features` like `Inventor` or `Ritualist`.

archetype_movement_swift.name: Swift
archetype_movement_swift.description: Movement speed increased by half your Tier (rounded up). Traverse the battlefield quicker.

archetype_movement_skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
archetype_movement_skirmisher.description: Does not trigger Punish Attacks for moving. +1 space melee attack reach. Maneuver through enemy lines freely.

archetype_movement_behemoth.name: Behemoth
archetype_movement_behemoth.description: Cannot be Grabbed, Moved, knocked Prone, or Stunned. Consistent positioning regardless of enemy interference.

archetype_movement_vanguard.name: Vanguard
archetype_movement_vanguard.description: Enemies that start their turn next to you have their movement speed halved until the start of their next turn. As part of a reaction Punish attack, you may move up to your full movement speed towards the target until the end of their turn. Enhanced zone control and battlefield presence.
special: Enemies starting adjacent have their movement speed halved.
Can move up to full movement speed as part of a reaction Punish attack.

archetype_movement_mole.name: Mole
archetype_movement_mole.description: Move your full speed through soft materials (dirt, clay, loose rock) and half your speed through hard materials (concrete, granite, packed rock). Choose whether you create permanent tunnels or temporary paths. Cannot end turn underground without tunnel creation.
special: Move full speed through soft terrain (dirt, clay).
Move half speed through hard terrain (rock, concrete).
Cannot end turn underground without creating a tunnel.

archetype_movement_flight.name: Flight (Alternative)
archetype_movement_flight.description: Move in any direction, ignore ground obstacles, and suffer no terrain penalties.

archetype_movement_teleportation.name: Teleportation (Alternative)
archetype_movement_teleportation.description: Instant movement to visible locations. Incurs a -2 sp movement penalty.

archetype_movement_portal.name: Portal (Alternative)
archetype_movement_portal.description: Create a pair of linked portals within your movement range. Anyone can move and act through them, and they persist until the start of your next turn.
special: Create linked portals within movement range, lasting 1 turn.

archetype_movement_swinging.name: Swinging (Alternative)
archetype_movement_swinging.description: Move to any point that has a stable surface you can connect to and move your full speed on any solid surface. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

archetype_movement_superjump.name: Super Jump (Alternative)
archetype_movement_superjump.description: You can jump up to your full movement speed in one leap. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

archetype_attacktype_singletarget.name: Single Target
archetype_attacktype_singletarget.description: Gain Melee AND Ranged attack types for 0p. Specializes in single-target elimination. The most versatile combat approach.

archetype_attacktype_aoespecialist.name: AOE Specialist
archetype_attacktype_aoespecialist.description: Gain AOE attack type for 0p. Excels at crowd control and managing multiple targets. Weaker than single target but hits many.

archetype_attacktype_directspecialist.name: Direct Specialist
archetype_attacktype_directspecialist.description: Gain Direct attack type for 0p. Provides reliable effect delivery that cannot be dodged. Perfect for consistent results.

archetype_effecttype_damagespecialist.name: Damage Specialist
archetype_effecttype_damagespecialist.description: Focus purely on dealing damage for maximum potential. Can still use Basic Conditions as separate attacks.

archetype_effecttype_hybridspecialist.name: Hybrid Specialist
archetype_effecttype_hybridspecialist.description: All attacks MUST combine damage and conditions. A versatile but less powerful approach in each aspect.

archetype_effecttype_crowdcontrol.name: Crowd Control
archetype_effecttype_crowdcontrol.description: Free access to 2 Advanced condition effects (chosen at selection), but suffer -Tier to all Damage rolls. Specializes in enemy control and debilitation, a strong team support role.

archetype_uniqueability_versatilemaster.name: Versatile Master
archetype_uniqueability_versatilemaster.description: Gain 2 Quick Actions per turn. When you select this archetype or advance Tiers, select a number of Primary Actions equal to half your Tier rounded up. You can use each of those Primary Actions as Quick Actions. At Tier 8, gain a third Quick Action.
special: Can use (Tier/2, rounded up) selected Primary Actions as Quick Actions.

archetype_uniqueability_extraordinary.name: Extraordinary
archetype_uniqueability_extraordinary.description: Gain an additional (Tier - 2) × 15 points added to your main pool. You can only spend up to (Tier - 2) × 15 points on Flaws or Traits. Ideal for characters specializing in Unique Abilities.

archetype_uniqueability_cutabove.name: Cut Above
archetype_uniqueability_cutabove.description: Gain universal stat bonuses to all core stats: Accuracy, Damage, Conditions, Avoidance, Durability, Resistances, Initiative, and Movement. Tiers 1-4: +1 | Tiers 5-7: +2 | Tiers 8+: +3.

archetype_defensive_stalwart.name: Stalwart
archetype_defensive_stalwart.description: Subtract your Tier from your Avoidance Score. Choose Physical OR Non-Physical damage: you take half damage from that type. Provides specialized damage resistance.

archetype_defensive_fortress.name: Fortress
archetype_defensive_fortress.description: Add your Tier again to Durability. Provides consistent protection against all damage.

archetype_defensive_resilient.name: Resilient
archetype_defensive_resilient.description: Add your Tier to all three Secondary Resistances (Resolve, Stability, Vitality). Makes you exceptionally good at resisting condition effects.

archetype_defensive_immutable.name: Immutable
archetype_defensive_immutable.description: Choose one Secondary Resistance type to gain complete immunity to it. An unshakeable defense against specific attacks.

archetype_defensive_juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
archetype_defensive_juggernaut.description: Increase your maximum Health Pool by 5 × Tier. Provides extra health reserves for attrition warfare.

archetype_specialattack_normal.name: Normal
archetype_specialattack_normal.description: Select 3 Specialty Upgrades at half cost. Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 6). Allows maximum customization flexibility.

archetype_specialattack_specialist.name: Specialist
archetype_specialattack_specialist.description: All limits selected must be applied to all attacks. Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 3). A higher return for a restricted playstyle.

archetype_specialattack_paragon.name: Paragon
archetype_specialattack_paragon.description: Each special attack receives 10 × Tier points. Cannot take Limits. Provides consistent performance without drawbacks.

archetype_specialattack_onetrick.name: One Trick
archetype_specialattack_onetrick.description: You can only create a single attack, but it gets Tier × 20 points. Cannot take Limits. High-risk, high-reward specialization.

archetype_specialattack_straightforward.name: Straightforward
archetype_specialattack_straightforward.description: Choose a single Limit to apply to all attacks. That Limit returns Points × (Tier ÷ 2). A simple but effective approach.

archetype_specialattack_shareduses.name: Shared Uses
archetype_specialattack_shareduses.description: You have 10 shared uses among abilities, and each attack costs 1-3 uses. Regenerate 1 Use per turn. Gain a Tier × 5 point discount per use cost. Cannot take Limits.
special: Tier × 5 point discount per use cost.

archetype_specialattack_dualnatured.name: Dual-Natured
archetype_specialattack_dualnatured.description: You can create two distinct Special Attacks, and each gets 15 × Tier points. Cannot take Limits. A balanced and versatile option.

archetype_specialattack_basic.name: Basic
archetype_specialattack_basic.description: Gain Tier × 10 points for base attack improvements only. No special attacks can be created. Good for builds that rely on their base attack.

archetype_utility_specialized.name: Specialized
archetype_utility_specialized.description: Gain double Tier bonus for one chosen core stat. Cannot purchase additional Expertise.

archetype_utility_practical.name: Practical
archetype_utility_practical.description: Select 3 skills to gain procifientcy in, each granting a 2 x Tier bonus to checks.

archetype_utility_jackofalltrades.name: Jack of All Trades
archetype_utility_jackofalltrades.description: Adds Tier bonus to ALL skill checks. Cannot purchase specialized Expertise.

flaw_balanced.name: Balanced
flaw_balanced.description: Must have at least half your Tier rounded down in each Combat Attribute, and can only add your Tier bonus once to each stat across Flaws, Traits, and Primary Actions.
restrictions: Must maintain minimum combat attribute requirements.

flaw_slow.name: Slow
flaw_slow.description: You cannot select a Movement Archetype.

flaw_combatfocused.name: Combat Focused
flaw_combatfocused.description: You cannot purchase any Utility abilities.

flaw_sickly.name: Sickly
flaw_sickly.description: Your maximum Health Pool is reduced by 30.

flaw_unresponsive.name: Unresponsive
flaw_unresponsive.description: You cannot take Reactions, you do not add your Tier to Initiative, and you cannot benefit from Surprise rounds.

flaw_weak.name: Weak
flaw_weak.description: You get 1 fewer Combat Attribute Point per Tier.

flaw_powerloss.name: Power Loss
flaw_powerloss.description: You lose your powers under specific circumstances, determined in discussion with the GM.

flaw_singletargetspecialist.name: Single Target Specialist
flaw_singletargetspecialist.description: You can only choose Melee OR Ranged attacks, not both.

flaw_equipmentdependent.name: Equipment Dependent
flaw_equipmentdependent.description: Choose a specific item; you lose access to one Archetype benefit without it. The item is noticeable and you can be disarmed of it.

boon_psychic.name: Psychic
boon_psychic.description: All conditions you inflict target Resolve resistance

boon_robot.name: Robot
boon_robot.description: Immune to most Vitality and Resolve conditions, vulnerable to Hacking/Electricity

boon_telekinetic.name: Telekinetic
boon_telekinetic.description: All conditions you inflict target Stability resistance

boon_biohacker.name: Biohacker
boon_biohacker.description: All conditions you inflict target Vitality resistance

boon_utilitarian.name: Utilitarian
boon_utilitarian.description: Gain 10 extra points for Expertise, Features, Senses, and Descriptors

boon_perfectionist.name: Perfectionist
boon_perfectionist.description: Reroll any natural 1s on d20 rolls

action_upgrade_base_attack_quick.name: Quick Base Attack
action_upgrade_base_attack_quick.description: Allows the Base Attack action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_dodge_quick.name: Quick Dodge
action_upgrade_dodge_quick.description: Allows the Dodge action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_brace_quick.name: Quick Brace
action_upgrade_brace_quick.description: Allows the Brace action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_fortify_quick.name: Quick Fortify
action_upgrade_fortify_quick.description: Allows the Fortify action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_aim_quick.name: Quick Aim
action_upgrade_aim_quick.description: Allows the Aim action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_empower_quick.name: Quick Empower
action_upgrade_empower_quick.description: Allows the Empower action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_refine_quick.name: Quick Refine
action_upgrade_refine_quick.description: Allows the Refine action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_assist_quick.name: Quick Assist
action_upgrade_assist_quick.description: Allows the Assist action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_assist_enhanced.name: Enhanced Assist
action_upgrade_assist_enhanced.description: Range increased to 15 spaces and you can target multiple allies up to your Communication or Intelligence score.

action_upgrade_carry_quick.name: Quick Carry
action_upgrade_carry_quick.description: Allows the Carry action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_carry_enhanced.name: Effortless Carry
action_upgrade_carry_enhanced.description: No movement speed penalty. Once you've taken this action once on a turn, you can continue to reuse it for free until the end of this turn.

action_upgrade_protect_quick.name: Quick Protect
action_upgrade_protect_quick.description: Allows the Protect action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_protect_enhanced.name: Guardian
action_upgrade_protect_enhanced.description: You can protect all adjacent allies simultaneously and gain extra reactions equal to half your Tier (rounded up) to use only for the Protect Action.

action_upgrade_use_quick.name: Quick Use
action_upgrade_use_quick.description: Allows the Use action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_hasten_quick.name: Quick Hasten
action_upgrade_hasten_quick.description: Allows the Hasten action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_hide_quick.name: Quick Hide
action_upgrade_hide_quick.description: Allows the Hide action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_prepare_quick.name: Quick Prepare
action_upgrade_prepare_quick.description: Allows the Prepare action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

condition_disarm.name: Disarm
condition_disarm.description: Forces the target to drop something they're holding. The dropped item can be picked up as a Quick Action. You may attempt to launch the item in any direction a number of spaces equal to how successful your roll was assuming you have the Capacity to move it.

condition_grab.name: Grab
condition_grab.description: The target cannot move. As an Action, the target can make a Stability check against the Condition roll to break free early, or as part of their movement to drag you with them following the rules for Capacity.

condition_shove.name: Shove
condition_shove.description: Push or pull the target a number of spaces equal to (Condition roll - Resistance). Collisions deal falling damage to both entities and you can expend 5 shoving spaces to knock the target prone.

condition_prone.name: Prone
condition_prone.description: Adjacent attacks against you gain +Tier to Accuracy, ranged attacks against you suffer -Tier to Accuracy. Standing costs 3 movement spaces.

condition_blind.name: Blind
condition_blind.description: Target treats all others as visually Hidden. Hidden attackers ignore the target's base Tier Avoidance bonus. When attacking, you must roll a Perception check vs the target's Stealth check; the attack is assumed to have missed on a failure.
condition_blind.duration: Until the end of your next turn

condition_daze.name: Daze
condition_daze.description: Target cannot take Quick Actions or Reactions.
condition_daze.duration: Until the end of your next turn

condition_setup.name: Setup
condition_setup.description: The next Accuracy check against the target adds double your Tier to their regular bonus.

condition_taunt.name: Taunt
condition_taunt.description: Target suffers a reduction to their Accuracy checks equal to double your Tier against all targets other than you.
condition_taunt.duration: Until the end of your next turn

condition_control.name: Control
condition_control.description: You control the target on their next turn. Common uses are making them attack, protect you, or become Stunned. If you or an ally attack them, the Control ends.
condition_control.duration: Until the start of your next turn

condition_stun.name: Stun
condition_stun.description: The target can take no actions or movement, their Avoidance is reduced to 0, and any attacks that hit them are considered critical hits.
condition_stun.duration: Until the start of your next turn

condition_weaken.name: Weaken
condition_weaken.description: Reduce the chosen stat by your Tier: Accuracy, Damage, Conditions, Avoidance, Durability, or All Resistances. This effect does not expire, but the target cannot be affected by more than one instance of Weaken.

condition_disablespecials.name: Disable Specials
condition_disablespecials.duration: Until the start of your next turn

condition_frighten.name: Frighten
condition_frighten.description: The target must move away from you and can only take the Hasten or Hide Actions. If there is nowhere to run or hide, they may take the Dodge or Brace Actions.
condition_frighten.duration: Until the start of your next turn

condition_enthrall.name: Enthrall
condition_enthrall.duration: Until the start of your next turn

condition_frenzy.name: Frenzy
condition_frenzy.description: Target attacks the nearest character indiscriminately.
condition_frenzy.duration: Until the start of your next turn

feature_aquatic.name: Aquatic
feature_aquatic.description: Swim at full speed in any aquatic environment. You are unaffected by water temperature, pressure, or current when swimming.

feature_debt.name: Debt
feature_debt.description: Someone owes you something. Work with the GM to determine the nature of the debt and what benefits you might gain when attempting to collect.

feature_eideticmemory.name: Eidetic Memory
feature_eideticmemory.description: You can recall any information you've previously encountered with perfect accuracy.

feature_linguist.name: Linguist
feature_linguist.description: You know a dozen languages, including more exotic or ancient ones. If you encounter a language you don’t know, you can attempt to decipher its meaning over time using intelligence.

feature_lock.name: Lock
feature_lock.description: You can place a protective barrier around a container or room. Your bonus to resist someone breaking into the container or room is 3 × your Intelligence. You can only have one lock active at a time, but you can disable and activate a new one at any time from anywhere.

feature_multilimbed.name: Multi-limbed
feature_multilimbed.description: You have additional limbs. Each purchase of this feature grants you one extra limb.

feature_naturalcommunication.name: Natural Communication
feature_naturalcommunication.description: You can converse with specific animal types and sense the health, needs, and recent history of plants. They respond with their level of intelligence and knowledge.

feature_parkourmastery.name: Parkour Mastery
feature_parkourmastery.description: Navigate urban environments using walls, buildings, and obstacles as movement paths automatically.

feature_personalvehicle.name: Personal Vehicle
feature_personalvehicle.description: You own a vehicle that allows you to travel quickly.

feature_speakwithanimals.name: Speak with Animals
feature_speakwithanimals.description: You can telepathically communicate with animals, and they can respond in kind. For 1 less point, you may instead communicate with only one specific type of animal.

feature_theprophesiedone.name: The Prophesied One
feature_theprophesiedone.description: A prophecy involves you. Those who believe in it will go to great lengths to assist you. Work with the GM to determine the prophecy's nature and cost.

feature_waterwalking.name: Water Walking
feature_waterwalking.description: Walk on any liquid surface as if it were solid ground automatically.

feature_ancestralknowledge.name: Ancestral Knowledge
feature_ancestralknowledge.description: You can communicate with ancestral spirits for guidance.

feature_assistant.name: Assistant
feature_assistant.description: You can call upon your personal assistant to help with mundane activities such as a butler, driver, or secretary. The assistant can handle routine tasks, carry out errands, and serve as a go-between for important social interactions, offering access to otherwise unavailable opportunities.

feature_auraticsway.name: Auratic Sway
feature_auraticsway.description: Emits a subtle aura that affects emotions or moods in the immediate vicinity. You can make an Intimidation or Communication check against everyone nearby to slightly alter their mood or emotions.

feature_distinguishedbackground.name: Distinguished Background
feature_distinguishedbackground.description: Your distinct heritage, noble birth, or foreign origin marks you as notable wherever you go. This grants you respect and curiosity that can open doors to influential individuals, exclusive events, and valuable information. However, it also makes you memorable and may create unwanted attention or suspicion depending on local politics and attitudes.

feature_dreamwalker.name: Dreamwalker
feature_dreamwalker.description: You can enter and interact with dreams.

feature_elasticmovement.name: Elastic Movement
feature_elasticmovement.description: Stretch your limbs to reach distant objects or compress your body to fit through spaces one-quarter your normal size automatically.

feature_fallproof.name: Fall Proof
feature_fallproof.description: Completely negate fall damage from any height automatically.

feature_familiar.name: Familiar
feature_familiar.description: You have a small-sized creature or construct that obeys your commands. You can see through its senses and control its movement. It uses your skills for any checks; if it's a creature, it uses your Awareness instead of Mobility. It cannot take actions other than skill checks. It has 0 in all combat stats, and if it takes damage, it is destroyed and cannot be resummoned until after a full rest. The familiar can scout dangerous areas, retrieve objects, or act as a distraction.

feature_forbiddance.name: Forbiddance
feature_forbiddance.description: Once per rest, over the course of an hour, you may create a ward that protects up to a 100 by 100 space area from observation, teleportation, and communication through the barrier. Choose one category of being (work with GM to define). Chosen creatures take (10 + Focus or Power) damage per turn spent in the area. The ward lasts one day. If you use this feature every day for 100 days in the same spot, the effect becomes permanent.

feature_glyphofwarding.name: Glyph of Warding
feature_glyphofwarding.description: It takes one hour to set up the trap, and you may set it to release one of your special attacks. The glyph may not be moved from where it was set up. You can have a number of active traps equal to your Intelligence score. If the trap is triggered, the attack is released. You suffer/are limited by your limits when setting the trap. Hidden traps require an Awareness or Intelligence check against double your Intelligence to detect.

feature_juryrigging.name: Jury Rigging
feature_juryrigging.description: You can repair or modify the function of any item or object without using materials. However, the repair is temporary and will break again at the end of the session or after intense use. The quality and duration of your repair is based on an Intelligence check determined by the GM.

feature_lightsleeper.name: Light Sleeper
feature_lightsleeper.description: You do not require sleep and are passively aware of your surroundings even while resting. Your Awareness checks are not reduced while resting, and you can remain alert during the party's rest periods. You still require the same rest duration to recover HP, Efforts, and ability uses.

feature_mastersculptor.name: Master Sculptor
feature_mastersculptor.description: Choose a specific material (stone, metal, wood, clay, etc.). You can precisely shape, mold, or alter that material at rapid pace, working on up to 8 cubic meters per minute. This allows you to create tools, artistic works, or modify existing structures made of your chosen material without requiring traditional crafting tools.

feature_materialshaping.name: Material Shaping
feature_materialshaping.description: You can temporarily transform mundane materials and objects into different forms. Convert one material into another similar material, or reshape an object into a different object of similar size and density. You cannot create complex mechanical devices or change the fundamental properties of materials (turning wood into metal, etc.).

feature_mysticguardian.name: Mystic Guardian
feature_mysticguardian.description: You can create temporary magical guardians or constructs that can complete simple tasks. These guardians can act as watchmen, couriers, or assistants in problem-solving tasks.

feature_objectencryption.name: Object Encryption
feature_objectencryption.description: You can seal items in a protective field to prevent tampering.

feature_prodigy.name: Prodigy
feature_prodigy.description: After 4 hour of focused study, gain Tier bonus to checks involving that specific topic until next rest.

feature_prophet.name: Prophet
feature_prophet.description: You receive visions of a future that may or may not happen. Once per session, you may attempt to force one of these visions. Roll a d100; the higher the number, the more accurate and less vague the vision becomes.

feature_psychiclink.name: Psychic Link
feature_psychiclink.description: You can share or transfer memories with a touch, or form a temporary psychic connection with another being. This can be used for strategic coordination, emotional support, or unique insight.

feature_psychometry.name: Psychometry
feature_psychometry.description: You can perceive the recent history and emotional imprints of objects through touch.

feature_safehouse.name: Safe House
feature_safehouse.description: You have access to a home that supports more than just yourself.

feature_socialnetwork.name: Social Network
feature_socialnetwork.description: You have extensive connections with various influential individuals. These connections can provide critical assistance, such as opening doors to exclusive events, securing resources, or obtaining valuable information.

feature_spiritcommunication.name: Spirit Communication
feature_spiritcommunication.description: You can speak with the spirits of the recently deceased in the immediate area.

feature_spiritualbind.name: Spiritual Bind
feature_spiritualbind.description: You can temporarily bind yourself to an object or location, granting limited influence, observation, or protection.

feature_sponsor.name: Sponsor
feature_sponsor.description: Someone has invested a great deal of time and/or money to get you where you are. You have greater access to resources, and they are inclined to protect their investment. However, you are beholden to them, and they might cut their losses if things get too dicey.

feature_stealthguidance.name: Stealth Guidance
feature_stealthguidance.description: You can add your Awareness score to the Stealth checks of any allies within 3 spaces of you that you designate. This ability helps your team move undetected while you coordinate their movements and watch for threats.

feature_streetperformer.name: Street Performer
feature_streetperformer.description: You can always find opportunities to earn money and resources through performances, hustling, or social connections. Make a Communication check to acquire money or secure free lodging and meals. The GM determines the difficulty based on the amount needed and local circumstances. Success may involve entertaining crowds, making deals, or leveraging social networks.

feature_streetwisenetwork.name: Streetwise Network
feature_streetwisenetwork.description: You have connections throughout various segments of society, providing you with valuable information about local people and places wherever you travel.

feature_superstrength.name: Super Strength
feature_superstrength.description: Add your Tier to your Capacity score.

feature_technopathy.name: Technopathy
feature_technopathy.description: You can interface directly with electronic devices and understand their functions/data.

feature_temporalecho.name: Temporal Echo
feature_temporalecho.description: You can temporarily replay past events regarding persons, places, and objects. This ability allows you to uncover secrets, retrace steps, or resolve mysteries tied to your surroundings.

feature_underworldconnection.name: Underworld Connection
feature_underworldconnection.description: You maintain a reliable contact within the criminal underworld who can facilitate communication and deliver messages discreetly across long distances. Your connection can also provide contraband, information, or covert assistance.

feature_wellconnected.name: Well Connected
feature_wellconnected.description: Once per session, if you say, "I Know a Guy," workshop with the GM to create an NPC who can help you with a specific task. GM secretly determines your relationship strength. Based on your history and request difficulty, they'll decide what favor or payment is required.

feature_alchemist.name: Alchemist
feature_alchemist.description: You are a master of creating experimental tinctures and tonics. The concoctions work a single time to accomplish a specific goal. You will need time to gather the required ingredients, requiring an Intelligence or Awareness check to forage or rolling a d100 and Communication to purchase. The GM will decide the DCs, the amount of time it takes, and any costs.

feature_astralprojection.name: Astral Projection
feature_astralprojection.description: While resting, you can travel to other locations using a spectral form. You are visible but intangible while astral projecting, able to move through solid objects and observe your surroundings. You can return to your body at will from any distance. You can use this form to gather information or travel to otherwise unreachable places.

feature_bard.name: Bard
feature_bard.description: You can sing a tune to help inspire others. For the next hour, a number of present characters up to your Communication score can add your Tier to a skill check declared before they roll.

feature_consciousnesstransfer.name: Consciousness Transfer
feature_consciousnesstransfer.description: You can temporarily swap consciousness with willing participants.

feature_corruption.name: Corruption
feature_corruption.description: Work with GM to establish corruption mechanics. When taking this feature, choose a trigger condition that grants significant power bonuses but risks permanent character corruption through failed resistance rolls.

feature_enhancedprocessing.name: Enhanced Processing
feature_enhancedprocessing.description: Think and perceive at extremely accelerated speeds while performing hundreds of simple mental tasks simultaneously. This allows you to process information, analyze situations, and react with superhuman mental velocity while tracking multiple variables in complex problems.

feature_hexer.name: Hexer
feature_hexer.description: You are able to inflict complex, lasting, and nearly incurable curses on others. To cast the curse, the target must be aware they are being cursed and within 18 spaces of you for one minute. Additionally, you must know the target's true name and/or one special condition determined by you and the GM. Work with GM to determine appropriate curse effects and lifting conditions.

feature_hiddentrap.name: Hidden Trap
feature_hiddentrap.description: It takes one hour to set up the trap, and you may set it to release one of your special attacks. You can set a number of traps equal to your Awareness per rest. If the trap is triggered, the attack is released. You suffer/are limited by your limits when setting the trap. Hidden traps require an Awareness check against double your Awareness to detect and a Mobility check to disarm or avoid.

feature_immortality.name: Immortality
feature_immortality.description: You are immortal, you can be killed but you will return to life after 24 hours. Work with the GM to establish a limitation for said immortality, a way in which you can truly be killed. Additionally, determine where you return and if there are any changes that affect you.

feature_inventor.name: Inventor
feature_inventor.description: You can create technological inventions. These inventions work a single time and to accomplish a specific goal. The GM will determine the Intelligence check difficulty based on the setting. It will take a number of hours of active downtime equal to the difficulty minus 10. Requires a suitable lab or workshop.

feature_knowitall.name: Know It All
feature_knowitall.description: You're very bossy and like to tell others how to do things. If you can spend one minute explaining how to do something better, another character can add your Intelligence to any check, provided they follow your advice.

feature_longrangeteleportation.name: Long-Range Teleportation
feature_longrangeteleportation.description: Teleport to any location that you can clearly visualize or have previously visited automatically after spending at least 1 minute in preparation, the longer the distance the greater the amount of time it takes.

feature_memorymanipulation.name: Memory Manipulation
feature_memorymanipulation.description: You can view, modify, or implant memories in willing or unconscious subjects. Cannot be used on actively resisting targets.

feature_mindreading.name: Mind Reading
feature_mindreading.description: Make an Intelligence or Awareness check to attempt to read a target's mind that you can see. The GM determines the difficulty based on the target's mental defenses and what information you're seeking. Success reveals the desired thoughts, memories, or knowledge the target possesses.

feature_molecularmanipulation.name: Molecular Manipulation
feature_molecularmanipulation.description: You can convert one mundane material into another mundane material of similar density and hardness. Wood can become plastic, stone can become metal, or cloth can become leather.

feature_perceptionfilter.name: Perception Filter
feature_perceptionfilter.description: Temporarily render objects or areas unnoticed by others. May require Stealth checks.

feature_quantumpocket.name: Quantum Pocket
feature_quantumpocket.description: You can store and retrieve objects in a subspace storage. This ability allows you to carry large or dangerous items without arousing suspicion or taking up inventory space.

feature_ritualist.name: Ritualist
feature_ritualist.description: You can create magical rituals. These rituals work a single time and to accomplish a specific goal. The GM will determine the check difficulty based on the setting. It will take one uninterrupted hour to complete and may require special ingredients, such as a specific location, blood, or a rare object.

feature_selfsacrifice.name: Self-Sacrifice
feature_selfsacrifice.description: As you activate this feature, increase your Tier by 4, for 6 rounds. At the end of the 6 rounds, you die. May change the penalty and/or bonus for something equivalent, discuss with GM. Cannot use if you have abilities that prevent death.

feature_telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
feature_telekinesis.description: You can move and manipulate objects at a distance using mental force. You can affect objects within your line of sight. The weight limit is based on your Capacity score: light objects effortlessly, medium objects with concentration, and heavy objects requiring significant effort.

feature_telepath.name: Telepath
feature_telepath.description:
You can communicate telepathically with any sentient being you can see or are familiar with across unlimited distances. They can communicate back if willing. You can maintain simultaneous mental links with a number of beings equal to your Intelligence score. Additionally, you can:
- Share complex memories, emotions, or sensory experiences
- Establish permanent mental bonds that persist even when unconscious
- Create group mental networks allowing all linked minds to communicate
- Attempt to influence thoughts and emotions of willing or weakened minds

feature_bleedingedge.name: Bleeding Edge
feature_bleedingedge.description: Your technology is the most advanced and powerful there is, allowing you greater feats beyond what normal technology can accomplish. However, it can only be repaired, maintained, modified, or upgraded using very specific or hard-to-find tools, methods, or materials.

feature_chameleon.name: Chameleon
feature_chameleon.description: You can effortlessly alter details about yourself, like hair color, hair length, skin tone, or eye color. You can't change things like bone structure, body shape, height, weight, or other drastic features. This ability can help you blend into a crowd or adopt a new persona during social encounters.

feature_consciousnessprojection.name: Consciousness Projection
feature_consciousnessprojection.description: You can project your consciousness to other locations simultaneously, experiencing multiple places at once. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and duration.

feature_hivemind.name: Hive Mind
feature_hivemind.description: You can link multiple minds into a temporary collective consciousness, sharing all thoughts and knowledge.

feature_perfectsanctuary.name: Perfect Sanctuary
feature_perfectsanctuary.description: Create an impenetrable zone around you and your allies for a short duration. Nothing can enter or leave this zone without your permission. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and duration.

feature_realityrevision.name: Reality Revision
feature_realityrevision.description: You can make minor alterations to recent events (within the last hour), changing their outcomes. Work with GM to establish limitations and consequences.

feature_timetravel.name: Time Travel
feature_timetravel.description: Move forward or backward through time automatically after spending 1 hour in preparation. Work with GM to determine limitations and potential paradox consequences.

sense_darkvision.name: Darkvision
sense_darkvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see clearly in complete darkness as if it were dim light.

sense_enhancedhearing.name: Enhanced Hearing
sense_enhancedhearing.description: Make Awareness checks to hear sounds at frequencies beyond the normal human range or at much greater distances.

sense_scentenhancement.name: Scent Enhancement
sense_scentenhancement.description: Make Awareness checks to identify specific individuals, substances, or emotional states through smell.

sense_tactilesensitivity.name: Tactile Sensitivity
sense_tactilesensitivity.description: Make Awareness checks to detect minute textures, vibrations, or temperature differences through touch.

sense_magneticsense.name: Magnetic Sense
sense_magneticsense.description: Make Awareness checks to determine cardinal directions and detect magnetic fields or metal objects.

sense_scenttracking.name: Scent Tracking
sense_scenttracking.description: Make Awareness checks to follow trails by scent, even hours or days old.

sense_echolocation.name: Echolocation
sense_echolocation.description: Make Awareness checks to navigate and identify objects in complete darkness using sound reflection. Range: Tier × 10 Sp.

sense_thermalvision.name: Thermal Vision
sense_thermalvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see heat signatures through walls and detect living creatures by their body temperature.

sense_microscopicvision.name: Microscopic Vision
sense_microscopicvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see cellular-level detail, identify microscopic organisms, or examine fine craftsmanship.

sense_tremorsense.name: Tremor Sense
sense_tremorsense.description: Make Awareness checks to detect movement and identify creatures through ground vibrations. Range: Tier × 5 Sp.

sense_aurasight.name: Aura Sight
sense_aurasight.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive emotional states, health conditions, and supernatural auras around living beings.

sense_timesense.name: Time Sense
sense_timesense.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive temporal distortions, time dilation effects, or chronological inconsistencies.

sense_xrayvision.name: X-Ray Vision
sense_xrayvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see through solid objects up to Tier × 2 Sp thick, revealing hidden structures or concealed items.

sense_psychicresonance.name: Psychic Resonance
sense_psychicresonance.description: Make Awareness checks to detect psychic activity, mental powers in use, or lingering psychic imprints.

sense_dimensionalsight.name: Dimensional Sight
sense_dimensionalsight.description: Make Awareness checks to see into adjacent dimensions, detect dimensional rifts, or spot interdimensional travelers.

sense_lifedetection.name: Life Detection
sense_lifedetection.description: Make Awareness checks to sense all living creatures within Tier × 100 Sp, regardless of concealment or barriers.

sense_energysight.name: Energy Sight
sense_energysight.description: Make Awareness checks to see all forms of energy (electrical, magical, radioactive) as visible spectrums.

sense_precognition.name: Precognition
sense_precognition.description: Make Awareness checks to glimpse potential futures.

sense_scrying.name: Scrying
sense_scrying.description: Make Awareness checks to remotely view any location you can clearly visualize or have previously visited. You can see and hear as if you were present at that location. Range is unlimited but clarity decreases with distance and unfamiliarity.

sense_auraanalysis.name: Aura Analysis
sense_auraanalysis.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive detailed information about any living being's powers, health status, emotional state, recent activities, and supernatural nature. This reveals their capabilities, conditions, and recent significant experiences through their personal aura.

sense_truthsight.name: Truth Sight
sense_truthsight.description: Make Awareness checks to see through all forms of deception, illusion, disguise, and concealment. This reveals the true nature of people, objects, and situations, cutting through magical and mundane forms of misdirection.

sense_uniquesense.name: Unique Sense
sense_uniquesense.description: Gain a supernatural sense for a specific phenomenon within 10 spaces at Tier 1, doubling each additional Tier. You automatically detect obvious manifestations; subtle ones require opposed Awareness checks. Examples include effects from a Descriptor (Electricity, Space, Time, Magic), a type of being (Human, divine beings, eldritch horror, powered person), or usage of an ability (Teleporting, Burrowing, specific Feature usage).

upgrade_extended_range.name: Extended Range
upgrade_extended_range.description: Ranged attacks reach 30 spaces instead of 15.

upgrade_long_range.name: Long Range
upgrade_long_range.description: Ranged attacks reach 100 spaces instead of 15.

upgrade_perception_range.name: Perception Range
upgrade_perception_range.description: Direct attacks can target anyone you can see instead of 30 spaces.

upgrade_enhanced_scale.name: Enhanced Scale
upgrade_enhanced_scale.description: Double the size of Area attacks (e.g., 6sp radius, 12sp cone, 24sp line).

upgrade_precise.name: Precise
upgrade_precise.description: Choose which targets are affected by Area attacks.

upgrade_ranged_aoe.name: Ranged AOE
upgrade_ranged_aoe.description: Area attacks can originate from a designated point within 15 spaces.

upgrade_accurateattack.name: Accurate Attack
upgrade_accurateattack.description: +Tier to Accuracy rolls, -Tier to Damage and Condition rolls. A basic accuracy/damage trade-off.

upgrade_reliableaccuracy.name: Reliable Accuracy
upgrade_reliableaccuracy.description: Advantage on Accuracy rolls, but suffer a -4 penalty to all Accuracy rolls. For consistent hitting with a reduced total bonus.

upgrade_criticalaccuracy.name: Critical Accuracy
upgrade_criticalaccuracy.description: Your critical hit range is expanded to 15-20 on the d20.

upgrade_powerfulcritical.name: Powerful Critical
upgrade_powerfulcritical.description: Add your Tier bonus again to Damage and Condition rolls on critical hits. Enhances the strength of your critical hit effects.

upgrade_overhit.name: Overhit
upgrade_overhit.description: When your Accuracy roll exceeds the target's Avoidance by 5 or more, add half the difference to your Effect roll. Rewards high accuracy against low-defense targets.

upgrade_blitz.name: Blitz
upgrade_blitz.description: +1 Accuracy for every 6 spaces you moved toward the target this turn. A mobile attacker bonus that stacks with movement.

upgrade_ricochet.name: Ricochet
upgrade_ricochet.description: Critical hits trigger an additional attack against a different target within range.
restrictions: The secondary attack cannot crit from the target being Stunned.

upgrade_doubletap.name: Double-Tap
upgrade_doubletap.description: Critical hits trigger the same attack again against the same target.
restrictions: The secondary attack cannot crit from the target being Stunned.

upgrade_explosivecritical.name: Explosive Critical
upgrade_explosivecritical.description: Critical hits trigger an attack against all enemies within 3 spaces of the target, if the attack would also hit them.
restrictions: Cannot apply to AOE attacks. Secondary attacks cannot crit from the target being Stunned.

upgrade_powerattack.name: Power Attack
upgrade_powerattack.description: +Tier to Damage rolls, -Tier to Accuracy rolls. A basic damage/accuracy trade-off.

upgrade_highimpact.name: High Impact
upgrade_highimpact.description: Replace your 3d6 damage roll with a flat 15 damage. Eliminates damage variance for consistent output.

upgrade_enhancedeffect.name: Enhanced Effect
upgrade_enhancedeffect.description: Add one additional damage die to your damage rolls. This increases your damage potential and average.

upgrade_reliableeffect.name: Reliable Effect
upgrade_reliableeffect.description: Roll an extra damage die, then drop the lowest result.

upgrade_criticaleffect.name: Critical Effect
upgrade_criticaleffect.description: All effect dice explode on rolls of 5 or 6. Dice continue rolling when showing 5-6, and results are cumulative.

upgrade_armorpiercing.name: Armor Piercing
upgrade_armorpiercing.description: Suffer a -Tier penalty to your Attack rolls to ignore the target's Durability bonus from their Endurance attribute. For Direct attacks, reduce the Damage roll instead of the Attack roll.

upgrade_brutal.name: Brutal
upgrade_brutal.description: When your Damage roll exceeds the target's Durability by 10 or more, you deal extra damage equal to half the difference.

upgrade_bleed.name: Bleed
upgrade_bleed.description: The target takes the identical damage again at the end of your next 2 turns.

upgrade_splashdamage.name: Splash Damage
upgrade_splashdamage.description: Adjacent targets take Tier+1d6 damage if your Attack roll would hit their Avoidance. Applies to Melee and Ranged attacks only.

upgrade_environmental.name: Environmental
upgrade_environmental.description: All hexes hit by the attack become hazardous terrain until the start of your next turn. Each rank after the first is an extra turn. Any character entering or ending their turn in an affected space takes the attack's Damage and Condition. Cannot have 'Precise' upgrade.

upgrade_shatter.name: Shatter
upgrade_shatter.description: Deal double damage to structures and vehicles. A specialized anti-object enhancement.

upgrade_leech.name: Leech
upgrade_leech.description: Regain HP equal to half the damage you deal.

upgrade_finishingblow.name: Finishing Blow
upgrade_finishingblow.description: If your attack reduces an enemy to 5×rank HP or below, the enemy is defeated instead. Maximum 3 ranks.

upgrade_cullingstrike.name: Culling Strike
upgrade_cullingstrike.description: If your attack reduces an enemy below 1/5 of their maximum HP, the enemy is defeated instead.

upgrade_criticalcondition.name: Critical Condition
upgrade_criticalcondition.description: Your Condition rolls critically hit on a 15-20 range on the d20.

upgrade_lastingcondition.name: Lasting Condition
upgrade_lastingcondition.description: If your Condition roll exceeds the target's Resistance by 10 or more, the condition's duration extends by 1 turn.

upgrade_masseffect.name: Mass Effect
upgrade_masseffect.description: A single Direct condition attack can target up to your Tier in enemies simultaneously. Suffers a -Tier penalty to Condition rolls.

upgrade_collateralcondition.name: Collateral Condition
upgrade_collateralcondition.description: A successful condition triggers the attack against all targets within a 3-space burst.
restrictions: Cannot apply to AOE attacks, and triggers only once per attack.

upgrade_contagious.name: Contagious
upgrade_contagious.description: A successful condition triggers the attack against the nearest enemy. Can chain up to Tier/2 times (rounded down) per attack.

upgrade_cursed.name: Cursed
upgrade_cursed.description: If 2 × (Condition roll - Resistance) is greater than or equal to the target's remaining HP, the condition becomes permanent.

upgrade_overwhelmingaffliction.name: Overwhelming Affliction
upgrade_overwhelmingaffliction.description: If your Condition roll exceeds the target's Resistance by 3 × Tier, the condition becomes permanent regardless of the target's HP.

upgrade_heavystrike.name: Heavy Strike
upgrade_heavystrike.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, adding +3×Tier to Damage and Condition rolls, but -Tier to Accuracy rolls.

upgrade_quickstrikes.name: Quick Strikes
upgrade_quickstrikes.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, allowing you to make the same Melee attack three times against a single target, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

upgrade_whirlwindstrike.name: Whirlwind Strike
upgrade_whirlwindstrike.description: A single Melee attack targets up to your Tier in enemies simultaneously, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

upgrade_headshot.name: Headshot
upgrade_headshot.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, adding +3×Tier to Damage and Condition rolls, but -Tier to Accuracy rolls.

upgrade_barrage.name: Barrage
upgrade_barrage.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, allowing you to make the same Ranged attack three times against a single target, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

upgrade_scattershot.name: Scatter Shot
upgrade_scattershot.description: A single Ranged attack targets up to your Tier in enemies simultaneously, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

upgrade_flurryofblows.name: Flurry of Blows
upgrade_flurryofblows.description: Make the same attack three times against a single target, with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy, Damage, and Condition rolls. Works with Melee or Ranged attacks.

upgrade_pounce.name: Pounce
upgrade_pounce.description: Move up to 6 spaces in a straight line toward the target as part of the attack. This movement occurs during the attack resolution.

upgrade_splinter.name: Splinter
upgrade_splinter.description: Defeating an enemy triggers another attack against a new target before your turn ends. Can chain up to Tier/2 additional attacks (rounded up).

upgrade_menacing.name: Menacing
upgrade_menacing.description: Reducing an enemy to 0 HP allows an Intimidation attempt against all enemies within 3 spaces of the target. Enemies with HP less than or equal to your Intimidation bonus will surrender.

upgrade_disengage.name: Disengage
upgrade_disengage.description: A successful hit prevents opportunity attacks from all hit targets until the end of your turn.

upgrade_extraattack.name: Extra Attack
upgrade_extraattack.description: A successful hit with a successful effect allows an identical attack against the same target. Must succeed on both Accuracy and Effect. Can only occur once per turn.

upgrade_analyzingstrike.name: Analyzing Strike
upgrade_analyzingstrike.description: +1 to a chosen stat (Accuracy/Damage/Conditions) for each previous Analyzing Strike against the same target. The bonus is capped at your Tier and resets if you skip attacking the target for one turn or activate it on another target.

upgrade_followupstrike.name: Follow-Up Strike
upgrade_followupstrike.description: A successful hit with a successful effect allows one Base Attack against the same target. Can only occur once per turn.

upgrade_counterattack.name: Counterattack
upgrade_counterattack.description: Using an attack against an enemy that missed you or failed their effect against you adds your Tier to a chosen roll (Accuracy, Damage, or Condition, selected at purchase).
restrictions: Cannot use with limits requiring you to be attacked or affected

upgrade_exploit.name: Exploit
upgrade_exploit.description: +Tier to Damage and Condition rolls against targets currently afflicted by any Condition.

upgrade_prioritytarget.name: Priority Target
upgrade_prioritytarget.description: After hitting a target, mark them as the Priority Target until the start of your next turn. Other characters gain a Tier/2 Accuracy bonus (rounded up) against this target. Can only be used once per turn.

upgrade_bully.name: Bully
upgrade_bully.description: Damaging a target with a Power score equal to or less than yours allows you to force a 1-space movement.

upgrade_martialartist.name: Martial Artist
upgrade_martialartist.description: Critical hits allow you to choose to apply Grab, a 3-space forced movement, or the Prone condition.

upgrade_grappler.name: Grappler
upgrade_grappler.description: Deal +Tier damage against targets you have Grabbed.

upgrade_minionslayer.name: Minion Slayer
upgrade_minionslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 10 maximum HP.

upgrade_captainslayer.name: Captain Slayer
upgrade_captainslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 25 maximum HP.

upgrade_eliteslayer.name: Elite Slayer
upgrade_eliteslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 50 maximum HP.

upgrade_bossslayer.name: Boss Slayer
upgrade_bossslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 100 maximum HP.

upgrade_luckystrike.name: Lucky Strike
upgrade_luckystrike.description: Using an Effort on this attack allows you to roll an extra die on the Effort roll.

upgrade_compressedrelease.name: Compressed Release
upgrade_compressedrelease.description: If you have an active Aura ability, you can disable it until the start of your next turn to add +Tier to your Accuracy, Damage, and Condition rolls.

upgrade_domain.name: Domain
upgrade_domain.description: If you have an active Barrier ability, gain +Tier to a chosen roll when attacking targets within your Barrier. Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

upgrade_towerdefense.name: Tower Defense
upgrade_towerdefense.description: If you have an active Wall ability, gain +Tier to a chosen roll when attacking targets on the opposite side of your Wall. Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

upgrade_channeled.name: Channeled
upgrade_channeled.description: For Ranged or AOE attacks. Spend your Primary Action + Movement on subsequent turns to repeat the attack. Gain +Tier to a chosen roll for each consecutive turn channeling (maximum 5 turns). Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

upgrade_focused.name: Focused
upgrade_focused.description: For Melee attacks. Spend your Primary Action + Movement on subsequent turns to repeat the attack. Gain +Tier to a chosen roll for each consecutive turn focusing (maximum 5 turns). Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

limit_charge-up.name: Charge-Up
limit_charge-up.description: Must use Primary Action on consecutive turns to charge before using attack

Extended Charge.description: Must charge for two turns before using

Triple Charge.description: Must charge three turns before using

Cascade Failure.description: If interrupted during any charge turn, lose ability for rest of combat

Escalating Exposure.description: Each charge turn reduces your Durability by 5

Rooted While Charging.description: Cannot move between charge-up and release

Immobilized.description: Cannot move until end of turn after releasing attack

Anchored.description: If moved from position by any effect, lose charge

Melee.description: The attack you are making is a melee attack

Concentration.description: Lose charge if you take damage or gain conditions

Fragile Concentration.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves adjacent to you

Cascade Failure.description: If concentration broken, you cannot attempt any attack with Concentration for rest of combat

Proximity Sensitivity.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves within 5 spaces of you

Fragile.description: Avoidance becomes 0 while charging, all attacks are critical hits

Beacon.description: All enemies within 30 spaces know your exact location while charging

Vulnerable.description: Take double damage from all sources while charging

Power Lock.description: Disable specific defensive ability while charging, gain points equal to that ability's cost

Extended Lock.description: Disabled ability remains unusable until end of next turn

Multiple Lock.description: Disable second defensive ability, gain its cost in points

System Failure.description: Requires Concentration - If interrupted, all locked abilities unusable for rest of combat

Focused Charging.description: Must also spend Quick Action on charge and release turns

Total Focus.description: Must spend Primary Action, Quick Action, and Movement on charge turns

Ally Coordination.description: Adjacent ally must attack same target you're charging against or charge fails

Reaction Delay.description: Cannot use Reactions while charging, gain points equal to cost of reaction abilities you have purchased

limit_reserves.name: Reserves
limit_reserves.description: Can only be used 3 times per combat. Regain all uses after combat ends

Extended Recovery.description: Regain uses after full rest instead of after combat, once per day

Volatile Uses.description: Each time you take damage, lose 1 use

Condition Trigger.description: Each time you gain a condition, lose 1 use

Critical Failure.description: If you roll a natural 1 on any d20, lose 1 use

Life Drain.description: If out of uses, and you would lose 1, take 15 damage instead

Shared Pool.description: Multiple special attacks share same use pool, total uses divided among them, +1 use to the pool for each special attack added

Pool Drain.description: If any attack in pool misses, remove an extra use

Cascade Lock.description: If any attack in pool misses, no attacks in pool can be used for 1 turn

Steady.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat

Patient.description: Cannot use until turn 5 of combat

Unhealthy.description: Must be below half HP to use

Timid.description: Cannot use unless you are at full hit points and are not affected by any conditions

limit_cooldown.name: Cooldown
limit_cooldown.description: Cannot use again for 1 turn after use

Cooldown 2.description: Cannot use again for 2 turns after use

Cooldown 3.description: Cannot use again for 3 turns after use

Permanent Injury.description: Each use of this limit, permanantly increases all cooldown cooldown periods by 1 turn, until you take a full rest

Fates.description: Roll a d4-1 when the attack is made, the cooldown is extended by the result

Failure Extension.description: If attack misses or fails effect, cooldown period increases by 1 turn

Doubling Failure.description: If attack misses or fails effect, cooldown period increases by 1 turn

Shared Cooldown.description: Choose 2 other of your special attacks, they can't be used while you are cooling down from this attack

Increased Cooldown.description: Choose 1 of your more special attacks, they can't be used while you are cooling down from this attack

Mass Cooldown.description: All of your special attacks cannot be used while you are cooling down from this attack

Death Proximity.description: Cooldown increases by 1 turn for every 25 HP below maximum

Trigger Extension.description: Taking damage or gaining conditions adds 1 turn to current cooldown

Condition Spiral.description: Conditions aquired last until the end of your cooldown period

Healthy.description: Your cooldowns don't go down unless you are above 50 HP and not affected by any advanced conditions

Pinnacle of Health.description: Your cooldowns don't go down unless you are at max HP and not affected by any conditions

Timid.description: You cannot use this attack unless you are at max HP and not affected by any conditions

limit_unreliable.name: Unreliable
limit_unreliable.description: Roll d20 before use; if under 5, attack fails and action is wasted

Double Check.description: Must make reliability check twice, both must succeed

Stress Breakdown.description: Reliability DC increases by 1 each turn of combat

Rapid Degradation.description: Reliability DC increases by an additional 1 each turn of combat

Health Dependent.description: DC increases by 1 for every 10 HP missing

Fearful.description: DC increases by 5 if an enemy is adjacent to you

Equipment Dependent.description: You have a specific, noticeable and disarmable item, in order to do any attack. There needs to be a reason, you wouldn't always have this item on you. (discuss with GM)

Fragile Gear.description: If you fail the Unreliable roll, the item breaks and won't be fixed until you spend 8 hours, or meet another specified condition (discuss with GM)

Maintenance.description: Equipment breaks if attack fails, requires action to repair

Cascading Failure.description: Each failure increases next reliability DC by 5

Spread Effect.description: Failed checks increase DC for all your special attacks

Critical Cascade.description: Failures in combat make ability unusable for rest of session

Attrition.description: When unreliable roll fails, take 15 damage

Attrition 2.description: When unreliable roll fails, take an additional 15 damage

Concussive Kickback.description: When unreliable roll fails, gain Stun condition, until the start of your next turn

Exhaustive.description: When unreliable roll fails, you must spend an effort or fall unconscious

limit_combo_move.name: Combo Move
limit_combo_move.description: You must have hit an enemy on your last turn

Revenge.description: You must have done damage on inflicted a condition on your last turn

Kill History.description: You must have defeated an enemy on your last turn

Perfect Opening.description: You must have critically hit on your last turn

Follow-Up.description: You must hit the same enemy as you did last turn

Switch Hitter.description: Can only target enemies you have not damaged this combat

First Blood.description: Can only target enemies no ally has damaged this combat

Finishing Move.description: Can only target enemies below half max HP

Ally Setup.description: Ally must have hit the same enemy you're about to attack this turn

Coordination.description: Ally attack must have damaged or inflicted a condition on the same enemy you're about to attack this turn

Perfect Teamwork.description: Must be a specific Ally, chosen when limit taken

Steady.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat

Patient.description: Cannot use until turn 5 of combat

Escalation.description: Cannot use until an ally is below half HP

Desperation.description: Cannot use until ally is unconscious

Set Up.description: Must have hit with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken)

Solid Set Up.description: Must have damaged or inflicted a condition with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken)

Perfect Opening.description: Must have critically hit with specific special attack

limit_unhealthy.name: Unhealthy
limit_unhealthy.description: Can only use when below max HP

Unhealthy 2.description: Can only use when at 75 HP or below

Unhealthy 3.description: Can only use when at 50 HP or below

Unhealthy 4.description: Can only use when at 25 HP or below

Unhealthy 5.description: Can only use when at 0 HP or below

Fresh Wound 1.description: Must have taken 15+ damage since the end of your last turn to use

Fresh Wound 2.description: Must have taken 30+ damage since the end of your last turn to use

Continuous Suffering.description: Must have taken damage on every turn for the last 3 turns, cannot be caused by Attrition

Condition Lock.description: Must be afflicted by a condition

Attrition 1.description: Each use costs 15 HP, paid after attack resolves

Attrition X.description: Each successive use costs additional 15 HP (15, 30, 45, etc.)

Concussed.description: You become stunned until the end of your next turn

Desperation.description: Can only use when an ally is at 25 HP or below

Last Resort.description: Can only use when 2+ allies are at 25 HP or below

Avenger.description: Can when an ally is unconscious

trait_condition_irregular1.name: Irregular 1
trait_condition_irregular1.description: Roll d20, DC 5 to activate each turn

trait_condition_relentless.name: Relentless
trait_condition_relentless.description: Dealt damage to enemy last turn

trait_condition_overwhelm.name: Overwhelm
trait_condition_overwhelm.description: Dealt damage to enemy this turn

trait_condition_temporary3.name: Temporary 3
trait_condition_temporary3.description: Activate for 3 turns, recharges after 1 minute rest

trait_condition_timid.name: Timid
trait_condition_timid.description: At max HP with no conditions

trait_condition_unbreakable.name: Unbreakable
trait_condition_unbreakable.description: Been hit but took no damage since last turn

trait_condition_untouchable.name: Untouchable
trait_condition_untouchable.description: All attacks missed since last turn

trait_condition_temporary2.name: Temporary 2
trait_condition_temporary2.description: Activate for 2 turns, recharges after 1 minute rest

trait_condition_temporary1.name: Temporary 1
trait_condition_temporary1.description: Activate for 1 turn, recharges after 1 minute rest

trait_condition_irregular2.name: Irregular 2
trait_condition_irregular2.description: Roll d20, DC 10 to activate each turn

trait_condition_dangerous.name: Dangerous
trait_condition_dangerous.description: No allies within 15 spaces, no civilians within 30 spaces

trait_condition_avenger.name: Avenger
trait_condition_avenger.description: Ally unconscious or great peril occurred

character_type_player_character.name: Player Character
character_type_player_character.description: A unique, player-controlled character with a full range of abilities.

character_type_npc_ally.name: NPC Ally
character_type_npc_ally.description: A friendly non-player character that assists the party.

character_type_other.name: Other
character_type_other.description: Select a specific character type from the sub-categories.

subTypes.name: Minion
subTypes.description: A standard, non-unique character. Typically found in groups and defeated easily.

subTypes.name: Captain
subTypes.description: A more durable character that often leads minions. A moderate threat.

subTypes.name: Vanguard
subTypes.description: A powerful and resilient character, a significant threat on the battlefield.

subTypes.name: Boss
subTypes.description: A major antagonist with a large health pool and unique, dangerous abilities.

descriptor_fire.name: Fire
descriptor_fire.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to forge materials without tools, melt locks, create emergency lighting, or purify contaminated substances through controlled burning 
 Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to regulate temperature in buildings, melt ice barriers, or create smoke signals visible for miles 
 Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense heat sources through walls, track warmblooded creatures, or identify recent fires 
 Crafting: Make Intelligence checks to work glass, ceramics, or metals with precision using controlled flame 
 Resistance: Immune to heatbased damage and environmental effects from extreme temperatures

descriptor_water.name: Water
descriptor_water.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to purify contaminated water sources, create ice tools/weapons, or navigate underwater environments 
 Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to create fog banks for concealment, redirect waterways, or cause/stop precipitation 
 Detection: Make Awareness checks to locate water sources underground, sense moisture levels, or track creatures through wet environments 
 Life Support: Make Intelligence checks to extract moisture from air in deserts or create breathable air pockets underwater 
 Resistance: Immune to drowning and pressure effects underwater

descriptor_earth.name: Earth
descriptor_earth.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to locate mineral deposits, create stone tools/barriers, or navigate underground 
 Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to create earthquakes, shape landscape, or reinforce structures 
 Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense vibrations through the ground, locate underground spaces, or identify geological instabilities 
 Construction: Make Intelligence checks to shape stone into precise architectural forms or create permanent fortifications 
 Resistance: Immune to crushing damage and effects from unstable terrain

descriptor_air.name: Air
descriptor_air.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to create updrafts for assisted flight, carry messages via wind, or clear toxic gases 
 Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to create localized weather patterns, disperse crowds with wind, or amplify/muffle sounds 
 Detection: Make Awareness checks to track scents across great distances, overhear distant conversations, or sense air pressure changes 
 Navigation: Make Awareness checks to determine wind patterns for sailing/flying or predict weather changes 
 Resistance: Immune to suffocation and airborne toxins

descriptor_lightning.name: Lightning
descriptor_lightning.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to power electronic devices, create precise electrical discharges, or generate electromagnetic fields 
 Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to disrupt electronics, create localized storms, or generate light displays 
 Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense electrical activity, track electronic devices, or identify electrical malfunctions 
 Communication: Make Intelligence checks to transmit messages through electrical networks or interfere with communications 
 Resistance: Immune to electrical damage and electromagnetic interference

descriptor_ice.name: Ice
descriptor_ice.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to preserve materials indefinitely, create precise ice constructs, or generate subzero environments 
 Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to freeze liquids instantly, create slippery surfaces, or generate protective barriers 
 Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense temperature variations, track warm creatures in cold environments, or identify frozen substances 
 Construction: Make Intelligence checks to create temporary ice structures or reinforce existing materials with ice 
 Resistance: Immune to cold damage and hypothermia effects

descriptor_kinetic.name: Kinetic
descriptor_kinetic.description:
Combat Enhancement: Enhance the force of moving objects, turning a pebble into a deadly projectile or a thrown spear into a devastating missile 
 Movement: Ignore impediments like mud, snow, or rubble, maintaining momentum without slowing 
 Defense: Absorb kinetic energy from impacts and transfer it elsewhere, such as reversing the force back to an attacker 
 Mobility: Defy gravity temporarily, running on walls or maintaining footing on impossibly narrow surfaces 
 Resistance: Immune to falling damage and impactbased effects

descriptor_plasma.name: Plasma
descriptor_plasma.description:
Environmental Control: Surround yourself with glowing plasma, providing light and damaging nearby enemies with searing heat 
 Detection: Detect the presence of plasma generators, power sources, or active weapons within a wide radius 
 Utility Applications: Manipulate plasmalike materials to weld, seal, or fuse objects permanently 
 Energy Mastery: Make Intelligence checks to generate controlled plasma discharges or manipulate existing plasma fields 
 Resistance: Withstand highenergy environments, including intense radiation or plasma discharges

descriptor_biological.name: Biological
descriptor_biological.description:
Regeneration: Heal from significant injuries and lost limbs or organs relatively quickly 
 Toxin Mastery: Identify, neutralize, or create potent toxins and antidotes instinctively. Highly resistant to toxins, diseases, and biological effects 
 Animal Connection: Form deep connections with animals, influencing their actions and understanding their emotions 
 Plant Revival: Revive withered plants by touch, causing them to grow rapidly, even in barren environments 
 Resistance: Immune to diseases, toxins, and biological manipulation

descriptor_technology.name: Technology
descriptor_technology.description:
Machine Communication: Communicate with machines as though they were sentient, intuitively diagnosing malfunctions or errors 
 Decryption: Make Intelligence checks to decode encrypted data or bypass advanced security systems 
 Remote Control: Remotely interact with and control electronic systems, such as locking or unlocking doors, or rerouting power 
 System Override: Temporarily interface with and influence complex systems like vehicles or automated devices 
 Resistance: Immune to technological surveillance and electronic interference

descriptor_mental.name: Mental
descriptor_mental.description:
Memory Sharing: Share vivid memories, ideas, or concepts directly into another's mind, bypassing verbal communication entirely 
 Emotion Amplification: Amplify the emotions of those around you to overwhelming levels, inducing fear, joy, or rage 
 Psychic Defense: Shield yourself from psychic intrusion, emotional manipulation, or mindaltering effects 
 Memory Recovery: Instantly retrieve forgotten memories or suppressed knowledge, including sensory details from years past 
 Resistance: Immune to mental manipulation and psychic attacks

descriptor_arcane.name: Arcane
descriptor_arcane.description:
Magic Detection: Detect and analyze magical effects within a wide radius, understanding their source and purpose 
 Glyph Mastery: Decipher, replicate, or counter magical glyphs and sigils, even if highly advanced 
 Magical Marking: Leave subtle magical traces on objects or locations, readable only by those with arcane knowledge 
 Artifact Sense: Sense and locate magical artifacts or enchanted items, regardless of concealment 
 Resistance: Immune to magical effects and supernatural manipulation

descriptor_time.name: Time
descriptor_time.description:
Temporal Perception: Make Awareness checks to see the past/future states of objects and locations 
 Chronological Analysis: Make Intelligence checks to determine exact timing of past events or predict future schedules 
 Temporal Crafting: Make Intelligence checks to age or restore objects to different time periods 
 Historical Investigation: Make Intelligence checks to witness past events as they occurred 
 Advanced Applications: Accelerate or reverse time in an area, or move yourself through time. Work with GM to establish specific capabilities, limitations, and narrative impact appropriate to your campaign
